prompt: Create a beautiful, high-quality professional portrait of a young South Asian woman seated gracefully on an ornate white carved stone garden bench in a lush, sun-drenched rose garden. She has long dark wavy hair parted slightly to one side, soft elegant styling, and wears traditional silver jhumka earrings. Her outfit is a flowing pastel blush-pink floral A-line dress with sheer long sleeves, with delicate pink rose prints, a modest round neckline, gathered waist, and airy romantic fabric draping over the bench. A fluffy white Persian cat rests calmly on her lap while she gently places one hand on it. The setting includes exactly one ornate bench, one central tiered white fountain softly blurred in the background, one pale column behind the garden, clusters of bright pink roses on the right and left, and lavender flowers blurred in the foreground. Use warm golden-hour sunlight, dreamy shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, soft backlighting, natural skin tones, realistic fabric texture, and an elegant editorial fashion photography look. Compose as a vertical 2:3 medium-full portrait, subject centered slightly right, seated posture, serene luxury garden atmosphere. Keep the face natural and unobstructed unless a privacy blur is requested; avoid extra people, text, logos, distorted hands, or unnatural anatomy.
